full_description: FocusForge is a productivity app designed to help users stay focused and avoid distractions. It provides a Pomodoro timer, which allows users to work in focused 25-minute increments, followed by a 5-minute break. This technique can help users stay on track and maintain a sustainable work pace. Additionally, FocusForge offers customizable blocklists for distracting websites and apps, allowing users to avoid common productivity pitfalls. With FocusForge, users can prioritize their tasks, minimize interruptions, and achieve their goals more efficiently. The app is easy to use and provides a simple, intuitive interface that helps users get started right away.
